<meta property="article:section" content="Uncategorized">    <script>
    (function() {
        function doLogic() {
            var landingPage = document.location.href;
            var queries     = document.location.search.trim().slice(1);
            var referrer    = document.referrer;
            var params      = {};
            var searchEngines = ['bing','google','yahoo','baidu','yandex','ask'];
            var source, medium, campaign, gclid, fbclid, term, content;

            queries.split('&').forEach(function(kv) {
                var parts = kv.split('=');
                if (parts[0]) params[parts[0]] = parts[1] || '';
            });

            source   = params.utm_source;
            medium   = params.utm_medium;
            campaign = params.utm_campaign;
            fbclid   = params.fbclid;
            term     = params.utm_term;
            content  = params.utm_content;

            if (params.gclid) {
                gclid    = params.gclid;
                source   = source   || 'google';
                medium   = medium   || 'cpc';
                campaign = campaign || '(not set)';
            }

            if (!source) {
                if (referrer) {
                    var engine = searchEngines.find(function(e){ return referrer.includes(e); });
                    if (engine) { source = engine; medium = 'organic'; }
                    else        { source = referrer; medium = 'referral'; }
                } else {
                    source = 'direct'; medium = '(none)'; campaign = '(not set)';
                }
            }

            return {
                landingPage  : landingPage,
                referrerPage : referrer,
                source       : source   || '',
                medium       : medium   || '',
                campaign     : campaign || '',
                fbclid       : fbclid   || '',
                gclid        : gclid    || '',
                term         : term     || '',
                content      : content  || ''
            };
        }

        // Сохраняем только если куки ещё нет
        function getCookie(name) {
            var m = document.cookie.match('(?:^|; )' + name + '=([^;]*)');
            return m ? decodeURIComponent(m[1]) : null;
        }

        // Отправляем данные на сервер через AJAX (WordPress nonce для безопасности)
        function sendToServer(cookieName, data) {
            var fd = new FormData();
            fd.append('action',      'utm_save_session');
            fd.append('nonce',       '86519109e6');
            fd.append('cookie_name', cookieName);
            fd.append('data',        JSON.stringify(data));
            fetch('https://comradeweb.com/wp-admin/admin-ajax.php', { method:'POST', body: fd });
        }

        var data = doLogic();

        if (!getCookie('firstSession')) {
            sendToServer('firstSession', data);
        }
        if (!getCookie('returnedSession')) {
            sendToServer('returnedSession', data);
        }
    })();
    </script>

  const headerTop = header.querySelector('.header__top');
  const mobBut = header.querySelector('.brxe-toggle');
  const nav = header.querySelector('.nav');
  const overlay = document.querySelector('.nav-menu__overlay');
  const allBtn = header.querySelector('.nav__menu-all_open');
  const servicesMenu = header.querySelector('.nav__submenu_l');
  const mq = matchMedia('(max-width: 1279px)');

  const navNested = document.querySelector('.brxe-nav-nested');
  const menuItemsWithSub = header.querySelectorAll('.header__nav-item.submenu');
  const allSubMenu = header.querySelectorAll('.nav__submenu');

  let topHeight = headerTop?.offsetHeight || 0;

  const rafThrottle = (fn) => {
    let scheduled = false;
    return () => {
      if (scheduled) return;
      scheduled = true;
      requestAnimationFrame(() => {
        scheduled = false;
        fn();
      });
    };
  };

  const updateTopHeight = () => {
    topHeight = headerTop?.offsetHeight || 0;
  };

  const resetMenu = () => {
    allSubMenu.forEach((s) => s.classList.remove('nav__submenu--open'));
    menuItemsWithSub.forEach((i) => i.classList.remove('nav__item__open'));
  };

  const isMenuOpen = () => {
    if (nav && (nav.classList.contains('nav--open') || nav.classList.contains('brx-open'))) return true;
    if (navNested && navNested.classList.contains('brx-open')) return true;
    return false;
  };

  const closeMenu = () => {
    if (!isMenuOpen()) return;
    mobBut?.classList.remove('mobile-button--active', 'is-active');
    nav?.classList.remove('nav--open', 'brx-open');
    overlay?.classList.remove('overlay--active');
    body.classList.remove('body--overflow', 'no-scroll');
    resetMenu();
  };

  overlay?.addEventListener('click', closeMenu);

  const closeMenuOnDesktop = () => {
    if (window.innerWidth >= 1280) closeMenu();
  };

  const closeMenuOnDesktopRaf = rafThrottle(closeMenuOnDesktop);

  const handleBreakpointChange = () => {
    requestAnimationFrame(() => {
      closeMenu();
      header.style.transform = 'translateY(0)';
      updateTopHeight();
    });
  };

  if (typeof mq.addEventListener === 'function') {
    mq.addEventListener('change', handleBreakpointChange);
  } else if (typeof mq.addListener === 'function') {
    mq.addListener(handleBreakpointChange);
  }

  window.addEventListener(
    'resize',
    rafThrottle(() => {
      updateTopHeight();
      closeMenuOnDesktopRaf();
    }),
    { passive: true }
  );

  closeMenuOnDesktopRaf();

  menuItemsWithSub.forEach((item) => {
    const subMenu = item.querySelector('.nav__submenu');
    const openBtn = item.querySelector('.nav__item');
    const backBtn = item.querySelector('.nav__submenu_m');

    openBtn?.addEventListener('click', (e) => {
      if (mq.matches) {
        e.preventDefault();
        subMenu?.classList.add('nav__submenu--open');
      }
    });

    backBtn?.addEventListener('click', () => {
      subMenu?.classList.remove('nav__submenu--open');
    });

    item.addEventListener('mouseenter', () => !mq.matches && item.classList.add('nav__item__open'));
    item.addEventListener('mouseleave', () => !mq.matches && item.classList.remove('nav__item__open'));
    item.addEventListener('focusin', () => !mq.matches && item.classList.add('nav__item__open'));
    item.addEventListener('focusout', () => !mq.matches && item.classList.remove('nav__item__open'));
  });

  let isWhite = (window.scrollY || 0) > 0;
  header.classList.toggle('header--white', isWhite);

  let ticking = false;
  let lastScrollPos = window.scrollY || 0;

  const onScroll = () => {
    if (nav?.classList.contains('nav--open')) return;
    if (ticking) return;
    ticking = true;

    requestAnimationFrame(() => {
      const current = window.scrollY || 0;

      const shouldBeWhite = current > 0;
      if (shouldBeWhite !== isWhite) {
        isWhite = shouldBeWhite;
        header.classList.toggle('header--white', shouldBeWhite);
      }

      if (current > lastScrollPos + 5 && current > 1) {
        header.style.transform = `translateY(-${topHeight}px)`;
      } else if (current < lastScrollPos - 5) {
        header.style.transform = 'translateY(0)';
      }

      lastScrollPos = current;
      ticking = false;
    });
  };

  window.addEventListener('scroll', onScroll, { passive: true });

  allBtn?.addEventListener('click', (e) => {
    const hidden = header.querySelectorAll('.header__hidden-link');
    if (!hidden.length) return;

    servicesMenu?.classList.add('nav__submenu_all');
    hidden.forEach((item) => item.classList.remove('header__hidden-link'));

    const wrap = e.currentTarget?.closest?.('.nav__link-wrap');
    if (wrap) wrap.remove();
  });
});

<h2 class="wp-block-heading">How to Build a Website That Reflects Your Landscaping Expertise</h2>



<p>Your landscaping business deserves more than just a simple online presence. A well-designed website can elevate your brand, attract clients, and showcase your creativity. Here’s how to craft a website that truly highlights your landscaping expertise.</p>



<h3 class="wp-block-heading">Step 1: Understand Your Audience and Define Your Brand</h3>



<p>Before designing anything, clarify who your ideal clients are. Are you targeting residential homeowners, commercial properties, or high-end luxury estates? Knowing your audience will guide your website’s tone, visuals, and functionality.</p>



<ul class="wp-block-list">
<li><strong>Create a brand identity:</strong> Decide on your color palette, fonts, and logo that reflect nature, creativity, and professionalism.</li>



<li><strong>Define your message:</strong> Your website should communicate your unique value, whether it’s eco-friendly solutions, innovative designs, or rapid project completion.</li>
</ul>



<blockquote class="wp-block-quote blog__blockquote_yellow is-layout-flow wp-block-quote-is-layout-flow">
<p><strong>Pro Tip:</strong> Use imagery and content that resonate with your audience’s aspirations — lush gardens, clean landscapes, or modern outdoor living spaces.</p>
</blockquote>



<h3 class="wp-block-heading">Step 2: Showcase Stunning Visuals of Your Work</h3>



<p>Landscaping is a visual art, so your website should put your projects front and center. High-quality images and videos can transform a visitor’s perception of your expertise.</p>



<ul class="wp-block-list">
<li><strong>Create a portfolio/gallery page:</strong> Display before-and-after photos to highlight your design and execution skills.</li>



<li><strong>Include project case studies:</strong> Explain the client’s problem, your solution, and the final result.</li>



<li><strong>Use video walkthroughs:</strong> Short clips of completed gardens, patios, or outdoor spaces can create an immersive experience.</li>
</ul>



<blockquote class="wp-block-quote blog__blockquote_yellow is-layout-flow wp-block-quote-is-layout-flow">
<p><strong>Tip:</strong> Optimize images for fast loading but retain quality — blurry photos can undermine your credibility.</p>
</blockquote>



<h3 class="wp-block-heading">Step 3: Make Navigation Simple and Intuitive</h3>



<p>A landscaping website should be visually appealing <strong>and</strong> easy to navigate. Visitors should quickly find the information they need.</p>



<ul class="wp-block-list">
<li><strong>Clear menu structure:</strong> Include tabs like Home, About Us, Services, Portfolio, Testimonials, and Contact.</li>



<li><strong>Call-to-action buttons:</strong> Make it easy for potential clients to request a quote, schedule a consultation, or call you directly.</li>



<li><strong>Mobile-friendly design:</strong> Many users will view your site on phones or tablets, so a responsive design is essential.</li>
</ul>



<blockquote class="wp-block-quote blog__blockquote_yellow is-layout-flow wp-block-quote-is-layout-flow">
<p><strong>Bonus Tip:</strong> Use a sticky navigation bar so visitors can easily explore your website without scrolling endlessly.</p>
</blockquote>



<h3 class="wp-block-heading">Step 4: Highlight Your Expertise and Credibility</h3>



<p>Your website should position you as an authority in landscaping. This builds trust and encourages clients to choose you over competitors.</p>



<ul class="wp-block-list">
<li><strong>Service descriptions:</strong> Clearly explain what services you offer, from lawn maintenance to landscape architecture.</li>



<li><strong>Testimonials and reviews:</strong> Showcase satisfied clients with photos or video testimonials.</li>



<li><strong>Certifications and awards:</strong> Feature any industry certifications, memberships, or design awards prominently.</li>
</ul>



<blockquote class="wp-block-quote blog__blockquote_yellow is-layout-flow wp-block-quote-is-layout-flow">
<p><strong>Advice:</strong> Include a blog with landscaping tips, DIY guides, and seasonal advice. It improves SEO and reinforces your authority.</p>
</blockquote>



<h3 class="wp-block-heading">Step 5: Optimize for SEO and Lead Generation</h3>



<p>Even the most beautiful website won’t generate business if potential clients can’t find it. SEO (Search Engine Optimization) ensures your site ranks well in search engines.</p>



<ul class="wp-block-list">
<li><strong>Use relevant keywords:</strong> Include terms like “landscaping services,” “garden design,” or your local area.</li>



<li><strong>Fast loading speed:</strong> A slow website can drive visitors away.</li>



<li><strong>Lead capture forms:</strong> Include contact forms, newsletter subscriptions, or downloadable guides to capture client information.</li>
</ul>



<blockquote class="wp-block-quote blog__blockquote_yellow is-layout-flow wp-block-quote-is-layout-flow">
<p><strong>Pro Tip:</strong> Regularly update your portfolio and blog to keep your site fresh — search engines love active websites.</p>
</blockquote>

  function initTocMoveOnScroll() {
    const breakpoint = 768;
    const glance = document.querySelector('.article__glance');
    const tocWrap = document.querySelector('.article__toc-wrap');
    const tocContainer = document.querySelector('.article__toc-container');
    const asideBlock = document.querySelector('.article__aside-block');

    if (!glance || !tocWrap || !tocContainer || !asideBlock) {
      return;
    }

    let isMoved = false;
    let ticking = false;
    let animationTimeout = null;

    function animateIn() {
      if (animationTimeout) {
        clearTimeout(animationTimeout);
      }

      tocWrap.style.transition = 'none';
      tocWrap.style.opacity = '0';
      tocWrap.style.transform = 'translateY(-10px)';

      animationTimeout = setTimeout(function () {
        tocWrap.style.transition = 'opacity 220ms ease, transform 220ms ease';
        tocWrap.style.opacity = '1';
        tocWrap.style.transform = 'translateY(0)';
      }, 20);
    }

    function resetStyles() {
      if (animationTimeout) {
        clearTimeout(animationTimeout);
      }

      tocWrap.style.transition = '';
      tocWrap.style.opacity = '';
      tocWrap.style.transform = '';
    }

    function moveToContainer() {
      if (isMoved) {
        return;
      }

      tocContainer.appendChild(tocWrap);
      animateIn();
      isMoved = true;
    }

    function moveBackToAside() {
      if (!isMoved && asideBlock.firstElementChild === tocWrap) {
        return;
      }

      asideBlock.insertBefore(tocWrap, asideBlock.firstChild);
      resetStyles();
      isMoved = false;
    }

    function updatePosition() {
      const isDesktop = window.innerWidth >= breakpoint;

      if (!isDesktop) {
        moveBackToAside();
        ticking = false;
        return;
      }

      const glanceRect = glance.getBoundingClientRect();
      const hasGonePastTop = glanceRect.bottom <= 0;

      if (hasGonePastTop) {
        moveToContainer();
      } else {
        moveBackToAside();
      }

      ticking = false;
    }

    function requestUpdate() {
      if (ticking) {
        return;
      }

      ticking = true;
      window.requestAnimationFrame(updatePosition);
    }

    window.addEventListener('scroll', requestUpdate, { passive: true });
    window.addEventListener('resize', requestUpdate);

    updatePosition();
  }

  if (document.readyState === 'loading') {
    document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded', initTocMoveOnScroll);
  } else {
    initTocMoveOnScroll();
  }
})();

<script>
  /** 
     * Loads a script with retry mechanism in case of failure
     * @function loadScript
     * @param {string} src - URL of the script to load
     * @param {number} [attempts=3] - Maximum number of loading attempts (default: 3)
     * @returns {Promise<HTMLScriptElement>} Promise that resolves with the loaded script element
     * @throws {Error} When script fails to load after all attempts
    */
  function loadScript(src, attempts = 3) {
    return new Promise(function(resolve, reject) {
      let script = document.createElement('script');
      script.src = src;

      script.onload = () => resolve(script);
      script.onerror = () => {
      if (attempts > 1) {
        script.remove();
        setTimeout(() => {
          loadScript(src, attempts - 1)
            .then(resolve)
            .catch(reject);
        }, 1000);
      } else {
        reject(new Error(`Script loading error ${src} after ${attempts} attempts`));
      }
    };

      document.head.append(script);
    });
  }
</script><script>
